get.summary: Get a list of all dealers. Required scope: apiDealers.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Optional, the number of records to return per page.

post.summary:
Create a dealer.
Required scope: apiDealers.w.

get.summary:
Get a list of all dealers in the context of the provided access token. Required scope: apiDealers.
Token has role SuperAdmin -> return everything. Token has EnterpriseKind Distributor -> return all dealers under the distributorId as specified in the calling accessToken. Token has EnterpriseKind Dealer -> return dealer with the dealerId as specified in the calling accessToken. Any other situation -> Unauthorized.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Optional, the number of records to return per page.

get.summary: Required scope: apiDealers.

Get a list of all Enterprises in the context of the provided access token. Required scope: apiEnterprises.
Token has role SuperAdmin -> return everything. Token has EnterpriseKind Distributor -> return all enterprises under the distributorId as specified in the calling accessToken. Token has EnterpriseKind Dealer -> return all enterprises under the dealerId as specified in the calling accessToken. Token has EnterpriseKind Customer -> return all enterprises with the enterpriseId as specified in the calling accessToken. Any other situation -> Unauthorized.

parameters.name: includeAllLevels
parameters.description: When True, includes alle levels of enterprises. Default: False.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Optional, the number of records to return per page.

Get a list of all text resources for the specified appId. Required scope: apiTextRes
This endpoint supports client caching with "If-Modified-Since" HTTP request header and "Last-Modified" HTTP response header.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: identifies a group of text resources.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Optional, the number of records to return per page.

get.summary:
Get a list of all text resources for the specified appId and category. Required scope: apiTextRes
This endpoint supports client caching with "If-Modified-Since" HTTP request header and "Last-Modified" HTTP response header.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: identifies a group of text resources.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Optional, the number of records to return per page.

get.summary:
Get a list of all text resources for the specified appId grouped by the text resource keys. Required scope: apiTextRes
This endpoint supports client caching with "If-Modified-Since" HTTP request header and "Last-Modified" HTTP response header.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: identifies a group of text resources.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Optional, the number of records to return per page.

get.summary:
Get a list of all text resources for the specified appId and category grouped by the text resource keys. Required scope: apiTextRes
This endpoint supports client caching with "If-Modified-Since" HTTP request header and "Last-Modified" HTTP response header.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: identifies a group of text resources.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Optional, the number of records to return per page.

get.summary:
Get translations for the specified appId and language with support for incremental sync.
Returns only changed translations based on the provided watermark timestamp.
This endpoint supports efficient translation syncing by returning 204 No Content when no changes exist.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: identifies a group of text resources (e.g., Mobile, EcoAct).

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: the language/culture code (e.g., en, es, he).

parameters.name: latestChangeDateTimeUtc
parameters.description: Optional watermark from previous sync. If not provided, returns all translations.

post.summary:
Request to clear all existing text resources of the appId and start adding an new text resources.
Required scope: apiTextRes.w
Required roles: SuperAdmin, Support.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The current page number. Start from 1. On page == 1, the existing text resource of the appId will be cleared.

parameters.name: totalPages
parameters.description: The total number of pages with text resources to store.

post.summary: Seeds enum values as text resources into the database.

requestBody.description: The seeding request containing enum definitions and app ID

500.description: Internal server error occurred during seeding

get.summary:
Get a list of all users in the context of the provided access token. Required scope: apiUsers.
Token has role SuperAdmin -> return everything. Token has EnterpriseKind Distributor -> return all enterprises under the distributorId as specified in the calling accessToken. Token has EnterpriseKind Dealer -> return all enterprises under the dealerId as specified in the calling accessToken. Token has EnterpriseKind Customer -> return the enterprise under the enterpriseId as specified in the calling accessToken. Any other situation -> Unauthorized.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Optional, the number of records to return per page.

post.summary:
Create a user.
Required role: superadmin.

get.summary:
Get a list of all users with details
Required scope: apiUsers.

Get the details of the specified user.
Required scope: apiUsers.

put.summary: Update user settings. Required scope: apiUsers.w.

delete.summary:
Delete a user.
Required scope: apiUsers.w.

get.summary:
Get exisiting roles that are defined for RBAC.
Required scope: apiUsers
Required roles: SuperAdmin.

post.summary: In the signup process, create a user with the company. Required scope: Allow Anonymous
In the signup process, create a user that has been invited. Required scope: Allow Anonymous.

put.summary:
Update user roles. All roles allowed. Only a user with role 'SuperAdmin' can assign roles. Existing roles will be removed.
Required scope: apiUsers.w.

post.summary:
Map a farm to a specific user.
Required scope: apiUsers.w.

put.summary:
Update the roles for the specified farm and user.
Required scope: apiUsers.w.
The roles represents the full list of roles granted to the user. Previouesly mapped roles that are not in the supplied list of roles, will be removed.
To remove all farm roles for a user, provide an empy list.

requestBody.description: The farm roles for the user.

delete.summary:
Map a farm from a specific user.
Required scope: apiUsers.w.

get.summary:
Get a list of all farms that are mapped to a specific user.
Required scope: apiUsers.

post.summary:
Generate an impersonation token for the specified user.
Required scope: apiUsers.w
Required roles: SuperAdmin, Support.

get.summary:
Validates an impersonation token.
Required scope: - (anonymous).

post.summary: Move a user to another Enterprise. Required scope: apiUsers.w.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User id of the user to move.

parameters.name: enterpriseId
parameters.description: Enterprise Id to move the user to.
